meta.method: Geographic proxy — Census 2021 regional socioeconomic profiles
meta.description: Per-primary complaint propensity index, calibrated to Ofgem complaint rate data. Propensity > 1.0 = above-average complaint likelihood; < 1.0 = below average. Replace with full LSOA-level dataset by running process-lsoa-complaints.mjs.
meta.baseRateNote: Complaints per customer per hour at propensity = 1.0
meta.calibrationSource: Ofgem Electricity Distribution Quality of Service Report 2024
